voiceSamples.subject: About your latest hire
voiceSamples.body: Saw you brought Jen on as VP Eng. Worked with her at Linear in 2022 — she has a way of turning a vague platform vision into something six people can execute on tomorrow. Lucky to land her.

voiceSamples.subject: Quick thought on your bonsai post
voiceSamples.body: Hey Marc — saw your post about the juniper. Tried wiring last winter and snapped a primary branch. What time of year do you find safest? Curious how you got that taper.

voiceSamples.subject: Re: outbound channel test
voiceSamples.body: Sent 40 emails to RevOps leaders this week using the angle we discussed. 6 replies, 3 calls booked. The thing that worked: dropping the 'I noticed' opener entirely. Just stating the specific problem we'd discussed at the dinner.

voiceSamples.subject: your dunning podcast episode
voiceSamples.body: Hey Dana, your episode with Tomas was the first explanation of dunning that didn't feel like a sales pitch. We do collections automation for B2B SaaS. If your stack is Stripe + HubSpot we can show you a 12% recovery lift in 4 weeks. Open to a Tuesday?

voiceSamples.subject: Sample 5 — comp post
voiceSamples.body: Pete — your team raised in April, doubled headcount, and the comp-plan post on LinkedIn mentioned you're rewriting variable comp from scratch. We built a comp tool for exactly this stage. Worth 20 minutes?

icp.valueProp: cut sales-cycle time in half using eval-gated AI outbound
